```{r submission-materials}
             "Topography", "Soil physical", "Soil nutrient", "Soil chemistry",
             "Solar radiation", "Pollinator-associated context"),
  variables = c(
    paste(temp_vars, collapse = ", "),
    "BIO4",
    paste(precip_vars, collapse = ", "),
    "BIO15",
    paste(topo_vars, collapse = ", "),
    paste(soil_phys_vars, collapse = ", "),
    paste(soil_nutrient_vars, collapse = ", "),
    "Soil pH",
    "RSDS",
    "Five species-specific Bombus SDMs; union-like composite"
  ),
  representation = c(
    "PC1", "standardized single predictor", "PC1",
    "standardized single predictor", "PC1", "PC1", "PC1",
    "standardized single predictor", "standardized single predictor",
    "exploratory standardized index"
  )
)
write_csv(table1, file.path(table_dir, "Table_1_predictor_definitions.csv"))
write_csv(primary_comparison, file.path(table_dir, "Table_2_primary_model_comparison.csv"))
write_csv(fixef_final, file.path(table_dir, "Table_3_selected_model_coefficients.csv"))
write_csv(var_decomp, file.path(table_dir, "Table_4_variance_decomposition.csv"))
write_csv(qgam_summary, file.path(table_dir, "Table_5_qGAM_smooth_tests.csv"))
write_csv(bee_plot, file.path(table_dir, "Table_S_Bombus_index_sensitivity.csv"))

sdm_selected_files <- list.files(bombus_eval_dir, pattern = "_selected_model\\\\.csv$",
                                 full.names = TRUE)
if (length(sdm_selected_files)) {
  sdm_selected <- dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(sdm_selected_files, readr::read_csv,
                                          show_col_types = FALSE))
  write_csv(sdm_selected, file.path(table_dir, "Table_S_Bombus_ENMeval_selected_models.csv"))
}

cfa_values <- setNames(as.numeric(fit_measures), names(fit_measures))
reviewer_audit <- tibble::tribble(
  ~component, ~check, ~value, ~status,
  "Colour measurement", "CFA convergence", as.character(lavaan::inspect(fit_pig, "converged")),
  ifelse(isTRUE(lavaan::inspect(fit_pig, "converged")), "pass", "fail"),
  "Colour measurement", "Composite omega", sprintf("%.3f", omega_cfa),
  ifelse(is.finite(omega_cfa) && omega_cfa >= 0.70, "pass", "inspect"),
  "Colour measurement", "Correlation with colour PC1",
  sprintf("%.3f", colour_index_sensitivity$correlation[1]),
  ifelse(colour_index_sensitivity$correlation[1] >= 0.90, "pass", "inspect"),
  "Predictors", "Maximum absolute pairwise correlation",
  sprintf("%.3f", max(abs(audit_cor[upper.tri(audit_cor)]), na.rm = TRUE)),
  ifelse(max(abs(audit_cor[upper.tri(audit_cor)]), na.rm = TRUE) < 0.70, "pass", "inspect"),
  "Predictors", "Maximum VIF including Bombus",
  sprintf("%.3f", max(vif_final$VIF, na.rm = TRUE)),
  ifelse(max(vif_final$VIF, na.rm = TRUE) < 5, "pass", "inspect"),
  "Spatial models", "CPO failures in selected baseline",
  as.character(sum(!is.finite(fit_final$cpo$cpo[IDX]))),
  ifelse(sum(!is.finite(fit_final$cpo$cpo[IDX])) == 0, "pass", "inspect"),
  "Natural anomaly", "PIT values available",
  sprintf("%d/%d", sum(is.finite(pit)), length(pit)),
  ifelse(mean(is.finite(pit)) >= 0.99, "pass", "inspect"),
  "Bombus", "M2 improves exploratory fit", as.character(delta_m2_vs_m1 < 0),
  "descriptive_only",
  "Anthropogenic exploration", "qGAM complete observations",
  as.character(nrow(qdat)),
  ifelse(nrow(qdat) >= 500, "pass", "inspect")
)
write_csv(reviewer_audit, file.path(repro_dir, "reviewer_audit.csv"))

fmt <- function(x, digits = 2) formatC(x, digits = digits, format = "f")
m0_waic <- primary_fits[["M0_spatial"]]$stats$WAIC
m1_waic <- m1$stats$WAIC
m2_waic <- m2$stats$WAIC
supported_terms <- coef_fig_tbl |>
  dplyr::filter(supported) |>
  dplyr::pull(label)

results_lines <- c(
  paste0("A total of ", nrow(dat0),
         " QC-eligible georeferenced observations entered the spatial analysis."),
  paste0("The prespecified abiotic–spatial model improved WAIC by ",
         fmt(m0_waic - m1_waic), " relative to the spatial-only model."),
  paste0("Adding the exploratory Bombus-associated index changed WAIC by ",
         fmt(m2_waic - m1_waic),
         " relative to the matched abiotic–spatial model. Anomalies were calculated from the minimum-WAIC selected model."),
  paste0("Abiotic predictors with 95% credible intervals excluding zero were: ",
         if (length(supported_terms)) paste(supported_terms, collapse = ", ") else "none", "."),
  paste0(sum(dat_used$upper_anomaly_95, na.rm = TRUE),
         " observations exceeded the upper 95% leave-one-out predictive threshold.")
)
writeLines(results_lines, file.path(text_dir, "results_key_sentences.txt"))

caption_lines <- c(
  "Figure 1. Georeferenced phenotyping and continuous floral-colour variation. Photograph-derived median sRGB values were converted to CIELAB and summarized by a prespecified latent display-colour model.",
  "Figure 2. Fixed effects from the minimum-WAIC ecological–spatial model and support for the prespecified M0–M2 model set. Filled points have 95% credible intervals excluding zero; models with ΔWAIC < 2 have comparable support.",
  "Figure 3. Exploratory Bombus-associated context. The left panel assesses dependence on the suitability-composite definition; the right panel shows overlap between the primary Bombus index and measured environmental axes.",
  "Figure 4. Selected-model anomalies. Positive PIT-normal anomalies indicate flowers darker than predicted by the minimum-WAIC ecological–spatial model in approximate leave-one-out prediction. Upper-tail enrichment and quantile relationships are exploratory and do not establish horticultural origin."
)
writeLines(caption_lines, file.path(text_dir, "figure_captions.txt"))

review_scope <- c(
  "Confirmatory core: photograph-derived continuous floral colour modelled against prespecified abiotic domains with an SPDE spatial field.",
  "Exploratory biotic extension: species-specific, spatially cross-validated Bombus suitability SDMs; suitability is not occurrence probability, abundance, visitation, or selection.",
  "Exploratory anomaly stage: upper-tail departure from the selected ecological–spatial model; association with human exposure does not establish horticultural origin.",
  "The SPDE field represents residual spatial dependence and cannot be uniquely attributed to history, genetics, or unmeasured environment.",
  "PCA reduces within-domain dimension; it does not make ecological domains or the Bombus index independent."
)
writeLines(review_scope, file.path(text_dir, "scope_and_inference_limits.txt"))

analysis_config <- list(
  pipeline_version = "FINAL_PUBLICATION_CLEAN_20KM",
  run_utc = format(Sys.time(), tz = "UTC", usetz = TRUE),
  random_seed = 42,
  input_csv = normalizePath(path.expand(in_csv), winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE),
  input_csv_md5 = unname(tools::md5sum(path.expand(in_csv))),
  rmd_path = tryCatch(normalizePath(knitr::current_input(), winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE), error = function(e) NA_character_),
  rmd_md5 = tryCatch(unname(tools::md5sum(knitr::current_input())), error = function(e) NA_character_),
  output_root = normalizePath(out_root, winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE),
  selected_model = best_model_name,
  primary_models = primary_terms,
  environment_terms = environment_terms,
  bombus_species = bombus_species,
  bombus_background_n = BOMBUS_BACKGROUND_N,
  bombus_coordinate_uncertainty_max_m = BOMBUS_MAX_COORD_UNCERTAINTY_M,
  mesh = list(max_edge_m = c(20000, 100000), cutoff_m = 5000),
  qgam_quantiles = taus
)
jsonlite::write_json(analysis_config,
                     file.path(repro_dir, "analysis_config.json"),
                     pretty = TRUE, auto_unbox = TRUE, null = "null")

saveRDS(
  list(
    fit_pigment_cfa = fit_pig,
    pca = list(
      temperature = temp_pc_obj,
      moisture = precip_pc_obj,
      soil_physical = soil_phys_pc_obj,
      soil_nutrient = soil_nutrient_pc_obj,
      topography = topo_pc_obj
    ),
    primary_fits = primary_fits,
    selected_model_name = best_model_name,
    qgam_models = qgam_models
  ),
  file.path(repro_dir, "fitted_analysis_objects.rds"),
  compress = "xz"
)

capture.output(sessionInfo(), file = file.path(repro_dir, "sessionInfo.txt"))
installed_used <- unique(c(
  "dplyr", "readr", "tidyr", "sf", "terra", "lavaan", "tibble", "INLA",
  "qgam", "mgcv", "ggplot2", "forcats", "purrr", "broom", "jsonlite",
  "digest", required_sdm_pkgs
))
package_versions <- tibble::tibble(
  package = installed_used,
  version = vapply(installed_used, function(pkg) {
    if (requireNamespace(pkg, quietly = TRUE)) as.character(utils::packageVersion(pkg)) else NA_character_
  }, character(1))
)
write_csv(package_versions, file.path(repro_dir, "package_versions.csv"))

all_outputs <- list.files(pub_dir, recursive = TRUE, full.names = TRUE)
all_outputs <- all_outputs[file.info(all_outputs)$isdir %in% FALSE]
output_manifest <- tibble::tibble(
  file = sub(paste0("^", normalizePath(pub_dir, winslash = "/"), "/?"), "",
             normalizePath(all_outputs, winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE)),
  bytes = file.info(all_outputs)$size,
  md5 = unname(tools::md5sum(all_outputs))
)
write_csv(output_manifest, file.path(repro_dir, "publication_output_manifest.csv"))
```

## Complete

```{r completion}
cat("Submission materials:", pub_dir, "\n")
cat("Reproducibility archive:", repro_dir, "\n")
```
